description: Spearheaded engineering value creation at Lightship Capital, directing a high-caliber team of engineers and advising portfolio companies on AI integration, engineering processes, and product development strategy.
achievements: Served as interim CTO leading a diverse team of 25+ engineers across 7 portfolio companies, advising on advanced AI integration, engineering processes, and product development strategies.

Built one of the first AI Grant Writers on GPT-3 (2021): a text-generation tool that united company knowledge and semantic search to generate prompts for grant submissions, enhancing grant response throughput 2.5x and delivering a 60% reduction in work labor.
Led the design and implementation of a transformative time-efficiency initiative, harnessing data analytics to optimize organizational productivity by 50%.
Helped shape Lightship's perspective on Generative AI before the post-ChatGPT inflection point.
